nasb.text: Now it came about at the end of the twenty years in which Solomon had built the house of the Lord and his own house

esv.text: At the end of twenty years, in which Solomon had built the house of the Lord and his own house,

cnv.text: 所羅門建造耶和華的殿和自己的王宮，用了二十年才完成。

ccb.text: 所罗门用二十年的时间兴建了耶和华的殿和他自己的王宫。
